textPlain: My advice is to have "some fair number" of SD cards and when you are done with the card in the camera, put it aside and install another card that hasn't been used in awhile.Because managing files is not only error prone, deleting files should be avoided to the extent your budget allows......and if you are shooting still (and not video) there's really no good reason to ever delete an image off an SD card because SD cards are cheap (because photos don't require highest speed cards). SD cards can be used as "film" in a digital camera.
Yeah, after working through this blog post, I ordered 6 more cards, so I can have a queue and not delete footage until project completion!
